title: Nothotsuga longibracteata
taxonomy: Nothotsuga longibracteata is classified as a species of coniferous tree in the cypress family (Cupressaceae). This species is native to East Asia and is a part of the genus Nothotsuga. Nothotsuga longibracteata is a relatively rare and less-studied species, but it is known to be an evergreen tree with scale-like foliage. The classification of Nothotsuga longibracteata is further supported by its morphological and molecular characteristics. It is a distinct species from other conifers in the Cupressaceae family.
